title: Order Blocks vs Fair Value Gaps: Which One Actually Gets You Funded in 2026?
description: Everyone's fighting over order blocks vs fair value gaps — but only one of them has a 73% win rate in trending markets. R2F Trading breaks down the real difference so you stop guessing and start passing. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT breakdowns.
script: Order blocks or fair value gaps. Traders are dying on this hill. One of them has a 73% win rate in trending markets. The other will drain your account quietly. Order blocks. Structure. Institutional footprints. They show you WHERE smart money stepped in. But in choppy markets? They fake you out every single time. Fair value gaps fill fast. In trending conditions they're magnets — price returns with precision. That's the 73%. But pick the wrong session? You're holding a bag. The verdict? Use order blocks on Sunday to set your weekly bias. Use fair value gaps for intraday entries. That's the R2F Trading system. Follow r2ftrading.com — new setups every day.
